# Shelby's Illustrations

This page is to display all the art that Shelby has created for the lab. For high-quality downloads go to....? encrypted link? lab computer?

NOTE: Shelby do you want to put watermarks on these ones?

## Lab Logos

::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![](../imgs/art/WWALK_logo.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALK_Patch.png)
:::

## Animals

::: {layout-ncol="5"}
![](../imgs/art/BisonLandscape.png)

![](../imgs/art/Female_Moose.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/20_FemaleMoose.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/22_Tracks.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/23_Calf.png)

![](../imgs/art/Pronghorn_Jumping.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/6_Pronghorn.png)

![](../imgs/art/Walleye.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/13_Wolf.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/18_Beaver.png)
:::

## Plants

::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![](../imgs/art/Braid.png)

![](../imgs/art/Braid2.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/11_Grassland.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/30_Sagebrush.png)
:::

## Methods

::: {layout-ncol="3"}
![](../imgs/art/Canada_MCN-OCN-WSFN.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/2_Interview.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/7_CommunityBasedMonitoring.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/9_Helicopter.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/10_LandUserSurvey.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/19_CameraTrap.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/21_SharingCircle.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/25_Telemetry.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/27_Guardians.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/28_GPSCollar.png)
:::

## Concepts

::: {layout-ncol="3"}
![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/1_Forestry.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/24_Urbanization.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/31_Interconnected.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/8_Fire.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/4_Fragmentation.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/26_Fence.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/5_TobaccoTie.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/12_Weaving.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/14_LandbasedLearning.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/17_WWALKtober_Reciprocity.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/29_Habitat.png)
:::

## Pattern Design

::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/3_Antlers.png)

![](../imgs/art/WWALKtober_Illustrations/15_Microscope.png)
:::
